message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor Actor
rectangle "«Analysis»\nUIConditionalFormattingCellExtension" as UIConditionalFormattingCellExtension
rectangle "«Analysis»\nUIConditionalFormattingCellSideBarExtension" as UIConditionalFormattingCellSideBarExtension
rectangle "«Analysis»\nConditionalFormattingCellPanel" as ConditionalFormattingCellPanel

Actor -> UIConditionalFormattingCellExtension : starts use case
UIConditionalFormattingCellExtension -> UIConditionalFormattingCellSideBarExtension : create()
UIConditionalFormattingCellSideBarExtension -> ConditionalFormattingCellPanel : create()
ConditionalFormattingCellPanel -> Actor : shows side bar

rectangle "«Analysis»\nUIConditionalFormattingCellExtension" as UIConditionalFormattingCellExtension2
rectangle "«Analysis»\nUIConditionalFormattingCellSideBarExtension" as UIConditionalFormattingCellSideBarExtension2
rectangle "«Analysis»\nConditionalFormattingCellPanel" as ConditionalFormattingCellPanel2

@enduml
